name: inventoryAlert
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.allClear === undefined || typeof output.result.allClear === 'boolean'
_note: Reads inventory[] from artifact.data (page Inventory Alert card sends {input: data}). Per item: qty=parseInt||0, reorder=parseInt||10; lowStock = qty<=reorder; expired = daysToExpiry<=0; nearExpiry = 0<daysToExpiry<=30. alerts[] is the SUBSET the card lists (low/expired/nearExpiry only) with {name,quantity,daysToExpiry,lowStock,expired,nearExpiry}. allClear=true when nothing flagged. Empty inventory returns the honest 'Add inventory items' prompt. POISON: NaN/negative quantity → 0; an unparseable expiryDate → daysToExpiry null (no flag); counts always finite. Pure compute, no STATE, no NaN leak.
